title: ConfigSource
description: A typed reference to an external or inline configuration source consumed by NLBoot, sourceos-boot, or the control plane, specifying its kind, location, and optional integrity binding.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

sourceKind.description: Transport mechanism or storage format: git repository, HTTP/HTTPS URL, OCI artifact, inline JSON/YAML, or an opaque bundle ref.

uri.description: URI of the configuration source. Required for git, http, and oci kinds.

gitRef.description: Git ref to check out when sourceKind is "git", e.g. "refs/heads/main" or "refs/tags/v1.2.3".

gitCommit.description: Pinned Git commit SHA. When present, the consumer must check out this exact commit.

contentHash.description: Content-addressed digest of the config payload, e.g. "sha256:...". Used for integrity verification.

inlineContent.description: Inline configuration payload when sourceKind is "inline". Must be a valid JSON object.

authRef.description: Optional URN reference to a CapabilityToken or credential object required to fetch this source.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the config source.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this config source record was created.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this config source.
